Interface IRasterTypeProperties4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control raster type properties.

[Guid("76670AF5-83DE-4262-813A-03AF86ACC1FC")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterTypeProperties4 : IRasterTypeProperties3, IRasterTypeProperties2, IRasterTypeProperties
